title: EvaluationSummary
description: Repo-local, LLM-free aggregation of session receipts grouped by runtime profile. By design there is NO single total score field, and adding one requires reopening the maintenance-budget questions (docs/governance/agent-runtime-evaluation-budget-entry-2026-07-16.md). Metrics from 'detected' model bindings must never be merged with 'verified' ones as equals. Main metrics count natural_task samples only. This artifact establishes observability; it is not itself G4 evidence.
x_export_prohibited: prompts, conversation content, code, or diffs

rate.description: null when the denominator is zero — never reported as 0 or 1 by convention.

groups.description: One entry per (coarse profile id x model binding tier x sample origin) observed in the window. Groups are never merged across detection tiers.

model_binding.description: Detection tier of the model field for samples in this group. Part of the group key.

sample_origin.description: Part of the group key. Only natural_task groups feed adoption/maturity claims; other origins are debug context.

maturity.description: uncalibrated: 0-2 samples. observed: 3-9. provisional: 10-29. established: >=30 AND task diversity criteria met — count alone is insufficient. drifted: runtime or governance environment changed; frozen until re-observed.

counts.description: Final-status counts derived from receipt/gate state, never from agent self-assessment.

validator_signal_tiers.description: Counts of validation signals by registry-derived tier, so theatrical validators cannot silently inflate pass rates.

drift_events.description: Full-fingerprint changes observed within the window while coarse id stayed constant.

task_diversity_note.description: Human-readable basis for (or against) the 'established' diversity criterion, e.g. 'all 30 samples are doc-only changes'.

pre_binding_receipts.description: Receipts older than schema 1.4 with no runtime binding; readable but excluded from grouping.

llm_calls.description: Locked to 0: summaries are never LLM-generated.
